rationale: Curated glossary entry: Hujja (Proof) — a rank in the Ismaili da'wa hierarchy below the Imam and Bab, bearing witness to the Imam.

rationale: Curated glossary entry: Imam — the divinely-designated guide of the believers, central to Ismaili (and Shi'i) theology.

original_excerpt: م کی آگ کو برداشت نہیں کر سکتا۔ ⏎  ⏎ عمر بن عبد العزیز ، حکومت کی لیکن ساری زندگی غربت

rationale: Curated glossary entry: 'Abd — servant/slave of God.

rationale: Curated glossary entry: 'Arsh — the divine Throne, the highest cosmological station in Islamic cosmology; in Ismaili thought, often identified with the Universal Soul or higher Intellects.

rationale: Curated glossary entry: Tawhid — affirmation of divine oneness; the foundational doctrine of Islam, given a strongly apophatic reading in Ismaili thought.
